fix: await brochure email in QR action to prevent fire-and-forget kill

Fire-and-forget promises in Next.js server actions can be terminated once
the response is returned (especially on Vercel). Awaiting the email ensures
it completes reliably before the action resolves.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: add OAuth client_credentials auth and Agent Interaction SDK

Phase 1: OAuth token management as alternative to personal API keys.
OAuthTokenManager handles token caching, expiry, invalidation, and
request coalescing. linear-api.ts supports dual auth modes with
automatic 401 retry for OAuth.

Phase 2: Agent Interaction SDK for structured agent sessions.
Webhook handler routes AgentSession events, immediately acknowledges
within 10s SLA, and queues work items. New linear_agent_session tool
supports thought/action/response/error/complete activities.

Phase 1 (Playable):
- Building door entry: 4 doors wired (PlayerHouse, GeneralStore, AnimalShop, Blacksmith)
- Beach spawn soft-lock: y=12→7 (no more ocean spawn)

Phase 2 (All loops verified working — zero fixes needed):

Phase 3 (Visual polish — in progress):

feat: uncertainty layer — Piste vs Confirmé

- CONFIRMÉ: Predictable movement (Sortie théâtre Châtelet)
- PISTE: Positioning bet (Club Pantin ferme ~04:00)

New vocabulary:
- Piste / Piste nuit / Piste soirée / Prochaine piste
- SignalCertainty type for honest uncertainty
- ProchainePiste for quest chain mechanic

"Drivers are gamblers. They like honest uncertainty."

commit.message:
Add multi-output stacking: global RF predicts all balls as extra features

predictor.py / accuracy.py:
- Before per-ball model training, fit a MultiOutputClassifier(RF) on all
  ball positions simultaneously using the same training split
- Its predictions (mo_pred_Ball1 … mo_pred_BallN) are appended to
  x_train/x_test as additional features so each per-ball model can
  observe the global RF's joint view of the draw
- At inference time, the MO model runs first on the current input vector
  and injects its predictions before the chained per-ball loop
- MO model saved/loaded as MultiOutput.joblib alongside ball models
- accuracy.py updated to run MO stacking before per-row evaluation

tests (test_model_persistence.py):
- Replicate the MO stacking step on base_input before the per-ball
  feature subset check and prediction assertions

commit.message:
fix: resolve PgBouncer connection exhaustion crashing staging and production APIs

MaxPoolSize was 100 but PgBouncer pools only allow 10-12 connections.
Hangfire defaulted to 4 workers (~52 connections alone). Combined with
Serilog DB sink, the app demanded ~160 connections per environment with
zero user traffic, causing a death spiral of failed retries.

Changes:
- MaxPoolSize: 100 → 10 for staging/prod (stays 20 for dev)
- MinPoolSize: 5 → 2 for staging/prod
- Hangfire WorkerCount: ProcessorCount (4) → 1
- Enlist: true → false (prevents known Npgsql TransactionScope leak)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add wash package descriptions and hero image fix (#24)

* Add automatic website scraping and enrichment to import pipeline

Major enhancement: imported listings now automatically go through the
full enrichment pipeline — crawl website → AI photo scoring → extract
rich data → generate AI description.

Changes:

1. discover-touchless: Added `enrich` action that runs the 4-step
   pipeline (bulk-crawl → bulk-classify → extract-rich-data →
   generate-descriptions). Batch imports auto-trigger enrichment
   for listings with websites. Added `refresh_photos` action to
   restore Google Places photos.

2. bulk-classify: Preserve Google Places photos during classification.
   Previously overwrote hero_image and photos array with website-
   scraped images. Now merges website photos after existing Google
   photos and prefers google_photo_url for hero image.

3. extract-rich-data: Added `listing_ids` parameter for targeted
   extraction (same pattern as generate-descriptions).

4. Listing page: Added `unoptimized` prop for images from non-
   whitelisted domains (website-scraped photos can come from any
   domain). Added OPTIMIZED_HOSTS set for hostname checking.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

- New edge function `enhance-wash-packages`: Uses Claude AI to generate
  concise descriptions for wash packages that only have names/prices.
  Processes in batches with offset support for large datasets.
- Migration to set hero_image from google_photo_url for 752 listings
  that had Google photos but no hero image set.

Gradle 8.8 + MixinGradle 0.7). Key API changes: MinecraftClient →
Minecraft, Text → Component, MatrixStack → PoseStack, Fabric events →
Forge event bus, ButtonWidget/TextFieldWidget/CheckboxWidget →
Button/EditBox/Checkbox, FabricLoader config path → FMLPaths.

Builds to forge/build/libs/discraft-forge-1.0.0.jar (reobfuscated).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix: Enable webgl feature for wgpu on wasm32 target

Root cause: wgpu 0.19 requires explicit 'webgl' feature flag for WebGL backend on wasm32.
Without this, only WebGPU is attempted, causing 'No available adapters' error in browsers
that don't support WebGPU (or in headless environments).

Changes:
- Added target-specific wgpu dependency for wasm32 with 'webgl' feature
- This enables WebGL fallback when WebGPU isn't available

References:
- https://github.com/gfx-rs/wgpu/wiki/Running-on-the-Web-with-WebGPU-and-WebGL
- https://sotrh.github.io/learn-wgpu/beginner/tutorial1-window/

feat: Make reviewer spawning polling defer to workflow script (#1789)

When a workflow script exists for a PR's channel, the polling fallback
in collect_reviewer_effects_with_source now uses a 5-minute delay
(PR_REVIEW_DELAY_SCRIPT_SECS) instead of the normal 45-second delay.
This ensures the script's real-time pr.opened handler via
rpc.spawn_reviewer() is truly authoritative, with polling only acting
as a safety net for missed webhooks.

The webhook_recently_handled window also scales with the delay, extending
to 600s when a script exists (vs 90s without).

Closes !2056

commit.message:
chore: consolidate Claude CI setup into composite action (#1273)

## Summary

- Extracts the repeated cargo-insta, cargo-nextest, rust-cache, and
shell installation steps from all 7 `claude-*` workflows into a single
composite action at `.github/actions/claude-setup/action.yaml`
- Each workflow now calls the composite action in one step instead of
duplicating 4 setup steps
- Updates the `claude-renovate` prompt to reference the composite action
as the canonical location for tool version pins

Net change: **-88 lines** (146 removed, 58 added). Tool version pins are
now in one place — future version bumps update 1 file instead of 7.

<details><summary>Per-workflow changes</summary>

| Workflow | Before | After | Change |
|----------|--------|-------|--------|
| claude-ci-fix | 4 setup steps | 1 composite action call | -13 lines |
| claude-issue-triage | 4 setup steps | 1 composite action call | -13
lines |
| claude-mention | 4 setup steps | 1 composite action call | -13 lines |
| claude-nightly-cleaner | 4 setup steps | 1 composite action call | -13
lines |
| claude-nightly-review-reviewers | 4 setup steps | 1 composite action
call | -13 lines |
| claude-review | 4 conditional steps | 1 conditional composite action
call | -15 lines |
| claude-renovate | 1 cache step | 1 composite action call (tools+shells
disabled) | ±0 lines |

</details>

Closes the follow-up from #1271.

## Test plan

- [x] Workflow YAML is valid (no syntax errors from `gh` push)
- [ ] Next Claude CI run on any workflow confirms the composite action
works

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-authored-by: worktrunk-bot <254187624+worktrunk-bot@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

- Complete manifest.json with proper PWA fields

Performance:
- Skip ESPN polling when tab is hidden (Page Visibility API)
- Skip pixel-aquarium game loop when tab is hidden
- Cache DOM element references in pixel-aquarium (was getElementById per frame)

fix(runners): close stale socket on re-enroll; single-pass template substitution

- `register_runner` is now `async def` so it can `await ws.close()` when a
  runner re-enrolls under the same name — prevents a stale WebSocket from
  continuing to pick up jobs after credentials rotate
- Replace chained `.replace()` calls in `get_install_script` with a single
  regex substitution pass, eliminating the placeholder-collision bug where
  user-supplied values containing another placeholder string (e.g. a URL
  containing `__API_URL__`) would be double-substituted

commit.message:
Add section 23: numerical solver confirms particles as topological defects

Key findings from 3D lattice simulation:
- No on-site potential → standard breathers radiate away
- omega_eff/omega_band = 1/sqrt(2) = Koide amplitude
- 3D cubic kink energy E(w) = M_kink * w(3w-1)/2 (pentagonal numbers)
- Second differences = exactly d=3
- w=3 cube most stable (60% localized vs 28% for w=1)
- Internal modes = 3w + 10 (increases by d=3 per width)
- Pentagonal Z = {1,5,12,22,35,51,70,92} maps to H,B,Mg,Ti,Br,Sb,Yb,U

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add Team Match Evaluation System for ISMC calibration

- 5 new models: EvaluationReviewer, EvaluationBatch, EvaluationItem, MatchEvaluation, WeightExperiment
- Two-step blind review flow: rate match quality from profiles, then rate AI narrative
- Access-code auth (same pattern as MemberReport, no Django login required)
- 6 views + forms for the full evaluation flow
- 6 templates with cream/forest/gold design system
- Management command: create_evaluation_batch (stratified sampling from delivered reports)
- Django admin registration for all 5 models
- Migration 0022

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
feat: 系统优化和测试完善 (#13)

* feat: 终端入库自动查询费率功能

实现终端批量入库时自动从支付通道查询费率信息，采用预览-确认两阶段流程。

## 功能特性
- 预览阶段：查询第一个终端费率作为样本展示
- 确认阶段：批量查询所有终端费率并保存
- 动态费率配置：使用 JSONB 支持不同通道的费率类型

## 技术实现

### 后端
- 新增 PreviewImport 接口：POST /api/v1/terminals/preview-import
- 新增 ConfirmImport 接口：POST /api/v1/terminals/confirm-import
- 新增 BatchCreatePolicies 方法：批量创建费率策略
- 新增 GenerateSNList 工具函数：SN 范围生成

### 前端
- 新增费率预览对话框（ElMessageBox）
- 动态渲染不同通道的费率类型
- 集成预览-确认入库流程

### 数据库
- 新增 terminal_policies.rate_configs 字段（JSONB）
- 创建 GIN 索引优化查询性能

## 代码质量
- 单元测试覆盖率 100%
- 消除代码重复（SN 生成逻辑）
- 修复 Nil 指针风险
- 符合 Go 代码规范

## 验证
- 后端编译通过
- 前端编译通过
- 27 项检查全部通过
- 数据库迁移已执行

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: 系统优化和测试完善

## 主要改进

### 移动端应用 (Flutter)
- 新增环境配置页面，支持动态切换测试/生产环境
- 完善交易模块数据模型和UI展示
- 优化钱包功能，新增流水查询和提现记录页面
- 改进代理商页面的数据展示和交互
- 新增交易详情组件和小部件
- 完善集成测试用例

### 后端服务 (Go)
- 新增完整的 Repository 层单元测试（30+ 测试文件）
- 优化通道适配器接口和实现
- 完善配置文件（生产和测试环境）
- 改进回调处理和快照服务
- 优化费率同步服务

### 数据库
- 新增多个数据库迁移文件
- 修复外键约束和唯一约束
- 添加缺失的索引优化查询性能
- 修复终端表列定义

### 文档和配置
- 更新 CLAUDE.md，新增代码修改规范和错误模式指南
- 完善 KZG 通道对接配置文档
- 新增部署文档
- 优化 CI/CD 工作流配置

### 测试覆盖
- 新增 30+ Repository 测试文件
- 新增 Agent 功能测试
- 完善现有测试用例
- 提高代码测试覆盖率

## 技术细节

### 移动端
- 使用 json_serializable 生成模型代码
- 实现环境配置动态切换
- 优化网络请求和错误处理
- 改进路由管理

### 后端
- 完善 Repository 接口定义
- 统一错误处理模式
- 优化数据库查询性能
- 改进日志记录

### 代码质量
- 遵循 Go 代码规范
- 完善单元测试
- 改进代码注释
- 优化代码结构

feat: patient detail page, RBAC fix, Clerk MFA styling, Clerk auth cleanup

- Add GET /api/patients/[id] route with PHI decryption and audit log
- Add /patients/[id] Server Component detail page (demographics, encounter history, status badges)
- Fix admin role missing patients.create permission in RBAC matrix
- Add Clerk MFA/OTP step appearance tokens (white text on dark bg) to sign-in and sign-up
- Remove custom TOTP MFA layer (backup-codes, mfa-cookie, mfa-rate-limit, mfa API routes, mfa-verify pages) — Clerk handles MFA natively
- Remove custom MFA fields from Prisma schema (migration: 20260304000001_remove_custom_mfa_fields)
- Add scripts/seed-admin.ts for seeding initial admin user

in notes render visually.
